mapper.sql: user_id, username, password, token, create_time, edit_time
mapper.insert:
insert into user_info
user_id,
username,
password,
token,
create_time,
edit_time,
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{token,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{editTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update user_info
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
token = #{token,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
edit_time = #{editTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update user_info set username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, password = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, token = #{token,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, edit_time = #{editTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
